school.name: Boys and Girls High School
school.district: NYC Public Schools — Brooklyn North, District 16
school.logoAlt: Boys and Girls High School logo
school.doeLogoAlt: New York City Public Schools logo
school.mission: The mission of Boys and Girls High School is to prepare our students to achieve their full potential, make positive choices, and have a plan for life after high school. This will be accomplished by creating an environment that will successfully teach our students to think critically and conscientiously about themselves, their community, and their global village.
school.vision: We believe students achieve success and embrace learning when they feel safe and are supported by competent and caring adults.

ticker: Welcome to Boys and Girls High School — Home of the Kangaroos
63% graduation rate — our highest in 7 years
PTA meets the 2nd Tuesday of every month — all families welcome
Regents prep, Saturday School, and P.M. School available all year

slides.alt: Colorful mural celebrating Boys and Girls High School history painted on a school hallway wall
Boys and Girls High School students walking together outside the school building
Students gathered in the Boys and Girls High School auditorium during an assembly
A teacher instructing Boys and Girls High School students working at their desks
Boys and Girls High School PSAL championship team posing with their trophy
Home of the Kangaroos banner displayed at Boys and Girls High School

news.title: BGHS PTA Meeting — June 25 @ 5PM: Executive Board Elections
news.summary: Join the June PTA meeting. Nominations and elections for the PTA Executive Board: President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer, Title I Chairperson, and SLT Chairperson.
news.imageAlt: Flyer for the BGHS PTA meeting on June 25, 2026 at 5 PM featuring executive board elections

news.title: Schools Closed Thursday, June 4 — Anniversary Day / Chancellor's Conference Day
news.summary: Staff development day; students do not attend. School resumes Friday, June 5, 2026.
news.imageAlt: Notice that schools are closed June 4, 2026 for Anniversary Day and Chancellor's Conference Day

news.title: BGHS PTA Meeting — June 9 @ 6PM
news.summary: We welcome you to join our June 2026 PTA meeting. Nominations and elections for the PTA Executive Board. Will YOU be an officer of our next PTA Board?
news.imageAlt: Flyer for the BGHS PTA meeting on June 9, 2026 at 6 PM

news.title: Schools Closed — Memorial Day & Eid al-Adha
news.summary: Schools closed Monday, May 25 (Memorial Day) and Wednesday, May 27 (Eid al-Adha). School resumes Tuesday, May 26 and Thursday, May 28.
news.imageAlt: Notice that schools are closed for Memorial Day and Eid al-Adha 2026

news.title: Open School Conferences — May 20, 2026
news.summary: We ask all parents, guardians, and adult representatives of every student to join us for these virtual meetings.
news.imageAlt: Letter to parents announcing Open School Conferences on May 20, 2026

news.title: Community School Forum — Tuesday, May 12 @ 6PM
news.summary: An interactive evening learning about community schools and how we can advocate for the students, staff, and families in our schools.
news.imageAlt: Flyer for the Boys and Girls High School Community School Forum on May 12, 2026 at 6 PM

news.title: Regents Boot Camp & Credit Recovery — Saturdays 9AM–3PM
news.summary: June Regents examinations are quickly approaching. Take advantage of Saturday review sessions: 4/25, 5/2, 5/9, 5/16, 5/30, 6/6, 6/13, and 6/20.
news.imageAlt: Flyer for Regents Boot Camp and Credit Recovery Saturday sessions from 9 AM to 3 PM

news.title: PSAT/SAT Make-Up Exam Day — Friday, April 24
news.summary: Make-up examinations for sophomores (PSAT) and juniors (SAT).
news.imageAlt: Notice for PSAT and SAT make-up exam day on Friday, April 24, 2026

news.title: Schools Closed — Spring Recess, April 2–10
news.summary: Schools closed April 2–10, 2026 for Spring Recess. School resumes Monday, April 13.
news.imageAlt: Notice that schools are closed April 2 through 10, 2026 for Spring Recess

contacts.name: Stephen Hudson
contacts.role: Electrical Installation Instructor — SST Course Provider

alumni.name: Shirley Chisholm
alumni.blurb: First African-American woman elected to Congress (1968) and first major-party Black candidate for President of the United States (1972). Alumna of Girls' High School.

alumni.name: Lena Horne
alumni.blurb: Legendary singer, actress, dancer, and civil rights activist, born in Bedford-Stuyvesant. Attended Girls High School.

alumni.name: Isaac Asimov
alumni.blurb: One of the most prolific authors of all time — more than 500 books of science fiction and popular science. Attended Boys High School, graduating at 15.
